title: Nocil is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Nocil is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Quality Control Engineer looking for your next big career move? Nocil in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Nocil:
Nocil is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nocil!
